---

# Step 04 — Edit Mode

**Persona:** Purchaser (Purchasing Staff / Buyer)
**Module:** 1
**Section:** 1.4
**Route:** `/procurement/purchase-order/:uuid` (edit mode)

---

## 1.4.1 Access Path

From Step 03 — PO Detail (view mode): click the **Edit** button (top right).

---

## 1.4.2 Flow Position

```mermaid
graph TD
    list["1. PO List"] --> create["2. Create PO"]
    create -->|"Blank / Manual"| detail["3. PO Detail"]
    create -->|"From Price List"| pricelist["2a. Price List Wizard"]
    create -->|"From PR"| frompr["2b. From PR Wizard"]
    pricelist --> detail
    frompr --> detail
    detail -->|Edit| edit["4. Edit Mode"]
    edit -->|Submit| inprog(["IN PROGRESS — Pending FC Approval"])
    style edit fill:#1a56db,color:#fff,stroke:#1a56db
```

---

## 1.4.3 Edit Mode Layout

When the Purchaser clicks **Edit**, the top-right button set changes:

**View mode:** `[Edit] [Comment]`
**Edit mode:** `[× Cancel] [💾 Save] [🗑 Delete] [💬 Comment]`

All PO header fields become enabled (editable). Items can be added, edited inline, or removed.

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ ← Purchase Order   PO20260400002   DRAFT                       │
│                    [× Cancel] [💾 Save] [🗑 Delete] [💬 Comment]│
│                                                                │
│ PO Information                                                 │
│ ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│ │ PO No.        PO20260400002  │ Workflow*   [Standard ▼]  │   │
│ │ PO Type       Manual         │ Description [____________] │   │
│ │ Vendor*       [เขมิกา… ▼]    │ Delivery Date* [date ▼]  │   │
│ │ Currency*     [USD ▼]        │ Exchange Rate  0.03119    │   │
│ │ Credit Term   [30 Days ▼]    │ Remarks      [__________] │   │
│ └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
│                                                                │
│ Items                                              [Add Item]  │
│ ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│ │ # │ Product* │ Order Qty* │ Unit │ Unit Price │ Disc% │   │   │
│ │   │ Tax │ Net Amount │ Tax Amt │ Total │ [Details] [🗑] │   │
│ └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
│                                                                │
│ Subtotal: 300.00  Discount: -0.00  Net: 300.00                 │
│ Tax: 21.00  Total: 321.00 USD          [Submit] (footer)       │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

![Edit mode — DRAFT PO full view](data:image/png;base64,)

![Edit mode — IN PROGRESS PO (Delete button present)](data:image/png;base64,)

(*) = mandatory field

---

## 1.4.4 PO Header — Editable Fields

| Field | Description | Mandatory | Type | Default | Validation | Business Logic |
|-------|-------------|-----------|------|---------|------------|----------------|
| Workflow | Approval routing template for this PO | Yes | Dropdown | — | Must select a workflow | Determines approval chain (e.g. FC only, FC → GM) |
| Vendor | Supplier for this PO | Yes | Dropdown (lookup) | Set at creation | Must select a vendor | Changing vendor does not affect existing item data |
| Delivery Date | Expected delivery date from vendor | Yes | Date picker | Set at creation | Must be today or later | Used for planning and tracking |
| Currency | Transaction currency for this PO | Yes | Dropdown | Set at creation | Must select a currency | Changing currency recalculates Exchange Rate |
| Exchange Rate | Rate to convert PO currency to base (THB) | No | Read-only decimal | Auto-populated | — | Auto-set by system when Currency changes |
| Credit Term | Payment terms agreed with vendor | No | Dropdown | 30 Days | — | — |
| Description | Free-text description of the PO purpose | No | Text area (256 chars) | — | — | — |
| Remarks | Additional free-text notes | No | Text area (256 chars) | — | — | — |

> **Note:** PO No. and PO Type are always read-only (system-generated). They are visible in edit mode but cannot be changed.

---

## 1.4.5 Items Section — Column Reference

The inline items table shows summary columns. Location, delivery point, and FOC data are managed inside the Item Details side panel (§1.4.6).

| Column | Description | Mandatory | Type | Default | Validation | Business Logic |
|--------|-------------|-----------|------|---------|------------|----------------|
| # | Row sequence number | — | Auto | Auto-increment | — | Resets if rows reordered |
| Product | Item/product selection | Yes | Dropdown (lookup) | — | Must select a product | Drives Unit default |
| Order Qty | Ordered quantity | Yes | Number | — | Must be > 0 | Used in Net Amount calculation |
| Unit | Unit of measure | No | Dropdown | From product | — | Pre-filled from product master |
| Unit Price | Price per unit in PO currency | No | Decimal | — | Must be ≥ 0 | Used in Net Amount calculation |
| Disc % | Discount percentage for this line | No | Decimal | 0 | Must be 0–100 | Applied before tax |
| Tax | Tax profile for this line | No | Dropdown | From product/default | — | Determines Tax % and Tax Amt |
| Net Amount | (Unit Price × Order Qty) × (1 − Disc %) | — | Read-only decimal | 0.00 | — | Auto-calculated |
| Tax Amt | Net Amount × Tax % | — | Read-only decimal | 0.00 | — | Auto-calculated from Tax profile |
| Total | Net Amount + Tax Amt | — | Read-only decimal | 0.00 | — | Auto-calculated |
| Details | Opens Item Details side panel | — | Link button | — | — | Contains Locations, Quantity, Pricing tabs |
| Remove (🗑) | Delete icon — removes this item row | — | Icon button | — | — | No confirmation dialog — row deleted immediately on click |

---

## 1.4.6 Item Details Panel (Edit Mode)

Clicking the **Details** link on any item row opens a right-side slide-over panel. In edit mode, all panel fields are editable.

### Details Tab

| Sub-section | Behaviour in Edit Mode |
|-------------|----------------------|
| Product | Read-only (set via inline dropdown) |
| Description | Editable text field |
| Locations table | Editable: add/remove rows; each row: Location (dropdown) \| Delivery Point (dropdown, filtered by Location) \| Qty |

> **Note:** Delivery point and location are managed here — they are not columns in the inline items table.

![Item Details panel — Details tab](data:image/png;base64,)

### Quantity Tab

| Field | Behaviour |
|-------|-----------|
| Order Qty | Editable; must be > 0 |
| Base Qty | Read-only; auto-converted from Order Qty via product's unit ratio |
| FOC | Editable checkbox — marks item as free-of-charge |

![Item Details panel — Quantity tab](data:image/png;base64,)

### Pricing Tab

| Field | Behaviour |
|-------|-----------|
| Unit Price | Editable decimal |
| Tax Profile | Editable dropdown |
| Tax % | Read-only; derived from Tax Profile |
| Disc % | Editable decimal (0–100) |
| Net Amount | Read-only; auto-calculated |
| Tax Amt | Read-only; auto-calculated |
| Total | Read-only; auto-calculated |

![Item Details panel — Pricing tab (edit mode)](data:image/png;base64,)

---

## 1.4.7 Add Item

Clicking **Add Item** (top right of Items section) appends a new blank row to the items table. Items can be added by two methods:

| Method | How |
|--------|-----|
| **From price list** | Select a product from the vendor's active price list — Unit Price pre-fills from the price list |
| **Manual entry** | Key in the product details directly — all fields entered by the Purchaser |

| Element | Behaviour |
|---------|-----------|
| New row position | Appended at bottom of items list |
| Product field | Dropdown — shows products from the vendor's valid (active) price list; manual entry also accepted |
| Unit | Pre-filled when a price-list product is selected; manually entered otherwise |
| Unit Price | Pre-filled from price list when applicable; empty for manual entry |
| Order Qty | Always empty — Purchaser enters quantity |
| Net Amount / Total | Shows 0.00 until Qty and Unit Price are filled |
| Location, Delivery Point | Set via the Item Details panel (Details tab → Locations table) |

---

## 1.4.8 Action Buttons, Behaviour & Validation

> **Form states:**
> - **Edit mode entered:** Cancel / Save / Delete / Comment visible in top-right. Submit visible in footer.
> - **Unsaved changes present:** Save button is active.

### Button Summary

| Button | Color | Visible When | Purpose / Use Case |
|--------|-------|--------------|---------|
| × Cancel | Outline/grey | Always in edit mode | Discard all unsaved changes and return to view mode — use when edits are incorrect and you want to revert to the last saved state |
| 💾 Save | Blue (primary) | Always in edit mode | Save header and item changes without submitting — use to persist partial work across editing sessions |
| 🗑 Delete | Red/danger | Always in edit mode (DRAFT and IN PROGRESS) | Permanently delete this PO — use when the PO was created in error and should be removed entirely |
| 💬 Comment | Outline | Always in edit mode | Open comment/attachment sidebar — use to add context or supporting documents visible to all workflow participants |
| Submit | Blue (primary) — footer | Always in edit mode for DRAFT | Submit PO for FC approval — use after saving all edits when the PO is complete and ready for financial review |

---

### On Cancel

**Purpose / Use Case:** Exit edit mode and discard all changes — use when edits were made in error and you want to restore the PO to its last saved state.

| # | Check | BR | Pass — what happens | Fail — what happens |
|---|-------|----|---------------------|---------------------|
| 1 | User clicks Cancel | BR-01 | All unsaved changes discarded immediately; PO returns to view mode with original values | — |

Cancel exits edit mode instantly and silently discards any changes — even after typed input was present.

> **Note:** Cancel exits edit mode immediately and discards all unsaved changes with no confirmation dialog.

![Cancel with no unsaved changes — exits immediately, no dialog](data:image/png;base64,)

![Cancel after typing input — changes discarded silently with no dialog](data:image/png;base64,)

---

### On Save

**Purpose / Use Case:** Persist header and item changes without starting the approval workflow — use to save partial work mid-session or to confirm a complete revision before submitting.

| # | Check | BR | Pass — what happens | Fail — what happens |
|---|-------|----|---------------------|---------------------|
| 1 | Vendor is selected | BR-02 | Proceeds to next check | Save blocked; validation error shown |
| 2 | Workflow is selected | BR-02 | Proceeds to next check | Save blocked; validation error shown |
| 3 | Delivery Date is set | BR-02 | Proceeds to next check | Save blocked; validation error shown |
| 4 | Currency is selected | BR-02 | Proceeds to next check | Save blocked; validation error shown |
| 5 | All mandatory item fields filled for each row | BR-03 | Changes saved; user remains in edit mode | TBC — row-level or form-level error message |
| 6 | Each item Qty > 0 | BR-03 | Changes saved | TBC — validation error on row |

---

### On Submit

**Purpose / Use Case:** Send the PO to the FC Approver for review and approval — use when all mandatory fields are filled, items are complete, and the PO is ready to leave the Purchaser's hands.

| # | Check | BR | Pass — what happens | Fail — what happens |
|---|-------|----|---------------------|---------------------|
| 1 | Workflow is selected | BR-02 | Proceeds to next check | Submission blocked; validation error |
| 2 | Vendor is selected | BR-02 | Proceeds to next check | Submission blocked; validation error |
| 3 | Delivery Date is set | BR-02 | Proceeds to next check | Submission blocked; validation error |
| 4 | Currency is selected | BR-02 | Proceeds to next check | Submission blocked; validation error |
| 5 | PO has at least one item | BR-04 | Proceeds to next check | TBC — empty items validation message |
| 6 | All mandatory item fields filled | BR-03 | Proceeds to next check | TBC — item-level validation message |
| 7 | All item Qty > 0 | BR-03 | Proceeds to dialog | TBC — item-level validation message |
| 8 | Purchaser confirms dialog | — | PO status → IN PROGRESS; routed to FC | Dialog dismissed; no change |

**Confirmation Dialog:**

| Element | Content |
|---------|---------|
| Title | "Submit Purchase Order" |
| Message | "This will submit the PO for processing. Are you sure?" |
| **Submit** button (Blue) | Confirms; PO routed to FC; Purchaser returned to PO list |
| **Cancel** button (Outline) | Dismisses dialog; no change |

![Submit PO confirmation dialog](data:image/png;base64,)

---

### On Delete

**Purpose / Use Case:** Permanently remove this PO — use when the PO was created in error or is no longer needed. If no items have been received, the system records the cancellation as a Void.

| # | Check | BR | Pass — what happens | Fail — what happens |
|---|-------|----|---------------------|---------------------|
| 1 | PO status is DRAFT or IN PROGRESS | BR-05 | Confirmation dialog opens | Button not visible (Approved / higher statuses) |
| 2 | Purchaser confirms deletion | — | System checks received quantity (BR-10) | Dialog dismissed; PO unchanged |
| 3 | No items received (received qty = 0 on all lines) | BR-10 | PO status set to VOIDED; Purchaser returned to PO list | PO cannot be deleted — partial receipt blocks deletion (TBC) |

**Confirmation Dialog:**

| Element | Content |
|---------|---------|
| Title | "Delete Purchase Order" |
| Message | `Are you sure you want to delete purchase order "PO20260400002"? This action cannot be undone.` |
| **Delete** button (Red) | Confirms deletion; PO voided (if nothing received) or deleted |
| **Cancel** button (Outline) | Dismisses dialog; PO unchanged |

![Delete PO confirmation dialog](data:image/png;base64,)

> **Note:** Clicking the remove icon (🗑) on an item row removes it immediately with no confirmation dialog.

---

## 1.4.9 Business Rules

| # | Rule | Reference |
|---|------|-----------|
| BR-01 | Cancel exits edit mode immediately with no confirmation dialog; all unsaved changes are silently discarded | Edit mode UX — PO-specific (differs from PR workflow) |
| BR-02 | Mandatory PO header fields: Workflow, Vendor, Delivery Date, Currency | FR-PO creation validation |
| BR-03 | Mandatory item fields: Product, Order Qty (> 0); Location and Delivery Point set inside Item Details panel | FR-PO item validation |
| BR-04 | PO must have at least one item before it can be submitted | FR-PO submission gate |
| BR-05 | Delete is available on DRAFT and IN PROGRESS POs; confirmation required; not available on Approved or higher statuses | FR-PO-005 lifecycle |
| BR-06 | Exchange Rate is read-only in edit mode; auto-updated when Currency changes | FR-PR-029 |
| BR-07 | Net Amount = (Unit Price × Order Qty) × (1 − Disc %); auto-calculated, read-only | FR-PR-003 |
| BR-08 | PO Type cannot be changed once PO is created | Creation method lock |
| BR-09 | Credit Term is optional; defaults to 30 Days | FR-PO header defaults |
| BR-10 | If a PO is deleted or closed with zero items received, the system records the outcome as VOIDED rather than a hard delete | FR-PO-005 void condition |

---

## 1.4.10 Edge Cases

| Scenario | System Behaviour |
|----------|-----------------|
| User clicks Save with no items | TBC — may save header-only or show validation error |
| User changes Currency after items have Unit Prices | Exchange Rate updates; Amount values recalculate in PO currency |
| User removes all items then submits | TBC — empty items gate expected |
| Submit on IN PROGRESS (returned) PO | PO resubmitted to FC; status remains IN PROGRESS |
| Delete on IN PROGRESS PO | Delete button is present in edit mode; confirmation dialog appears before deletion |
| Item Product field cleared (set to blank) | TBC — validation on save |
| Qty set to 0 after being saved | TBC — validation enforced on submit |
| Two items with same product | Allowed — system does not deduplicate |
| Session timeout while in edit mode | Changes lost; PO returns to last saved state on reload |

---

## 1.4.11 Navigation

| Action | Destination |
|--------|-------------|
| Click × Cancel | Step 03 — PO Detail (view mode, same PO) |
| Click 💾 Save → success | Stays in edit mode (same PO) |
| Click Submit → Confirm | PO advances to IN PROGRESS; Step 01 — PO List |
| Click Submit → Cancel | Stays in edit mode (same PO) |
| Click 🗑 Delete → Confirm | PO deleted; Step 01 — PO List |
| Click 🗑 Delete → Cancel | Stays in edit mode (same PO) |

---

## 1.4.12 API Endpoints

| Method | Endpoint | Purpose |
|--------|----------|---------|
| PATCH | `/api/procurement/purchase-order/:uuid` | Save PO header changes |
| POST | `/api/procurement/purchase-order/:uuid/items` | Add new item to PO |
| PATCH | `/api/procurement/purchase-order/:uuid/items/:itemId` | Update existing item |
| DELETE | `/api/procurement/purchase-order/:uuid/items/:itemId` | Remove item from PO |
| POST | `/api/procurement/purchase-order/:uuid/submit` | Submit PO for approval |
| DELETE | `/api/procurement/purchase-order/:uuid` | Delete PO |
